title: Ore Hearts Avayt
description: Tired of regular hearts? Want something new and love ores? This resource pack is for you! Replaces almost all vanilla hearts. Yes
body:
![Golden Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da2d24bcae8e00a0c997f8657572f2163d3e3f3.png)![Normal Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df7dfbc1e28e7ba29fc32c5017aa3a133a9cd8e3.png)![Poisoned Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2273ce105e2ae59c0f9c45e55cdc774f7712b2.png)![Withered Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e493d63dde4ab8d8fa0ce9949328a41ab972eb.png)![Frostbitten Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f7f5835187a195f97aec90563898721cb9873df.png)    


Tired of regular hearts? Want something new and love ores? This resource pack is for you! Replaces almost all vanilla hearts. Yes
P.S THX FOR 100 DONWLOADS
